summary: Comprehensive testing of 3 Nigeria-specific safety features: Nigeria Emergency Numbers, One-Chance Mode, and SMS Fallback. All features verified working. Backend: 28/28 tests passed. Frontend: All 10 requested features verified.

minor.issue: Test function returns value instead of None - cosmetic warning only

passed_tests: Nigeria Emergency Numbers - Compact version renders on Home page with 3 quick-dial buttons (112, 199, Fire)
Nigeria Emergency Numbers - Full version renders on Find Safety page with expandable header
Nigeria Emergency Numbers - Quick-dial buttons (112, 199, 122) are visible and clickable
Nigeria Emergency Numbers - Region selector shows National, Lagos, Abuja, Rivers, Kano
Nigeria Emergency Numbers - Lagos region shows Lagos RRS, LASEMA, LASTMA numbers
One-Chance Mode - Card visible on Home page with toggle switch
One-Chance Mode - Settings dialog opens with all options (Shake to Trigger, Silent Mode, Auto Record, Fake Shutdown, Vibration)
SMS Fallback - Component renders showing Online status
SMS Fallback - 'Send Location to Contacts' button visible and clickable
SMS Fallback - 'Open SMS App' button visible
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 Nigeria-specific features verified working: 1) NigeriaEmergencyNumbers - displays quick-dial emergency numbers (112, 199, 122) with regional options (Lagos, Abuja, Rivers, Kano) on both Home (compact) and Find Safety (full) pages, 2) OneChanceMode - shake-to-trigger silent SOS with settings dialog for Shake to Trigger, Silent Mode, Auto Record Audio, Fake Shutdown Screen, Vibration Feedback, 3) SMSFallback - sends location via SMS when offline with 'Send Location to Contacts' and 'Open SMS App' buttons. Backend endpoints POST /api/incidents/sms-sos and POST /api/sms/send-location both working.

nigeria_emergency_numbers.home_page_compact: Working - Shows 3 quick-dial buttons (112, 199, Fire Service)
nigeria_emergency_numbers.region_selector: Working - National, Lagos, Abuja (FCT), Rivers, Kano
nigeria_emergency_numbers.lagos_numbers: Working - Lagos RRS, LASEMA, LASTMA visible

one_chance_mode.card_visible: Working - Shows on Home page with toggle
one_chance_mode.settings_dialog: Working - Opens with all 5 settings options

sms_fallback.send_location_button: Working - 'Send Location to Contacts' button visible
